creator: sahil@tandon.net
text:
Moose 0.96 requires Class::MOP 0.98 or higher, so the port's Makefile
needs to be revised to check for p5-Class-MOP>=0.98.

By the way, Moose 0.98 was released on 10 Feb 2010 in case you want to
use this as an opportunity to submit a revised patch that updates
devel/p5-Moose to that version.  Otherwise, I will take care of it when
I have some time.  Thanks for your help, wen!

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@tandon.net>
